plugins.name: oolio-pm
plugins.description: Oolio Product Management. The full PM toolkit, signal to shipped: feedback intake into JPD, idea grooming to Oolio's field and title standards, PRD writing and grilling, decision validation against the Virtual Product Council and its hospitality persona library, Jira epic hygiene, Steering packs, the GTM suite, post-launch metrics review, and the research house: signal synthesis via HubSpot, web, and Apify, competitor dossiers, sweeps and battlecards, and win/loss mining. Twenty-two skills.
